sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63150" key="liqo/blhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθό-βλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stone-throwing, pelting</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εὐστοχίη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n63150.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">set with stones</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κεκρύφαλα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.269</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
